fields.acceptance_criteria: Rewritten spec removes workflow-cli as product goal; validation workflow becomes default shared-library behavior in ticket/spec/doc APIs and future test/log APIs; test-api and log-api responsibilities are defined; workflow-cli is marked prototype-only
fields.title: Rewrite workflow validation spec around embedded memory-api behavior
